meta.note: GM mode uses genMarket(gm_under) with ACTIVE_MARKET patched to --market. Campaign career start uses ladder tier-1 market from campaignMode.js (typically Nashville), overriding the patched constant when beginCareer runs.

interpretation.summary: Reaching Tier 5 is not enough in this sample; players still fail to convert — investigate Tier 5 bar and earlier-tier damage.
bullets: Mean ending confidence on Tier 5 assignments is meaningfully below the promotion (win) threshold — the bar may still be the binding constraint.
Entrants show non-trivial prior demotions or firings — momentum lost before Tier 5 may matter as much as the Tier 5 bar.
Wins remain zero in both extended and long profiles among runs that reach Tier 5 — threshold strictness and/or Tier 4 carryover remain suspects.

narrative.roundingVsAssignmentEnd: Final GM confidence matches Math.round(final raw) — assignment-end classification is not introducing a separate floor.
narrative.fingerprintRepeat: Formal review sequences differ across seeds — not a single identical replay.
narrative.shelfAt44: Final confidence varies across runs — not a single shelf at 44 in this sample.
